title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into Contract for the Services of Mr. Rainier Joseph P. Dagala As Consultant for Public Relations with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Thirty Thousand Pesos (P 30,000.00). Councilor Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap 01/23/2023
